_comment: ASFA Retirement Standard — lump sums needed at 67 and the on-track age milestones. All verified from ASFA (March quarter 2026 / Feb 2026 release).
assumptions: ASFA figures are in today's dollars (2.75% AWE deflator, 6% assumed earning rate), assume the retiree draws down all capital and receives a part Age Pension, and assume home ownership unless stated.
onTrackAssumption: ASFA 'on track' milestones assume a future pre-tax income of $65,000 that keeps pace with inflation, targeting the comfortable single standard.
